episodes.name: Fill or Kill
episodes.overview: A group of master thieves break into Lochmill Capital and hold Zara and her colleagues at gunpoint, attempting the heist of the century.

episodes.name: Face Value
episodes.overview: In the aftermath of the heist, Zara finds herself under intense pressure as Luke breaks down. DCI Rhys meets unexpected resistance on the investigation.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/a46y87a8u6fg/steal-s01e02-720p-amzn-web-dl-hin-eng-ddp5-1-x264-daniewatch-hot" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Short Run
episodes.overview: A flashback shows more of Zara and Luke's lives pre-heist. Present day, Zara finds herself in a high-stakes situation. Running out of options, she makes a risky choice.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/vzxnm5yg1dmw/steal-s01e03-720p-amzn-web-dl-hin-eng-ddp5-1-x264-daniewatch-hot" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Risk On
episodes.overview: Zara makes a dangerous alliance to uncover the truth about the heist. A revelation about the missing Lochmill money puts Rhys in conflict with powerful figures.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/885co9vdp9tx/steal-s01e04-720p-amzn-web-dl-hin-eng-ddp5-1-x264-daniewatch-hot" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Pay Yourself First
episodes.overview: Zara is given a life-changing ultimatum. With her survival on the line, who can she really trust?
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/pmpi1vffuvgm/steal-s01e05-720p-amzn-web-dl-hin-eng-ddp5-1-x264-daniewatch-hot" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Dead Cat Bounce
episodes.overview: An action-packed final showdown at Lochmill Capital has devastating consequences. In a shocking reveal, all truths about the heist come to light.
